name: private-health-cloud
description: Conceptual and contractual scaffold for HealthOS Private Cloud.

scripts.validate:examples: npx --yes ajv-cli@5.0.0 validate -s contracts/applications/ApplicationManifest.schema.json -d examples/scribe.application.json --strict=false && npx --yes ajv-cli@5.0.0 validate -s contracts/agents/AgentManifest.schema.json -d examples/patient-agent.manifest.json --strict=false && npx --yes ajv-cli@5.0.0 validate -s contracts/integrations/CapabilityRequest.schema.json -d examples/search-patient-context.request.json --strict=false && npx --yes ajv-cli@5.0.0 validate -s contracts/governance/GovernanceDecision.schema.json -d examples/governance-decision.allow.json --strict=false && npx --yes ajv-cli@5.0.0 validate -s contracts/consent/ConsentRecord.schema.json -d examples/consent-record.example.json --strict=false && npx --yes ajv-cli@5.0.0 validate -s contracts/audit/AuditEvent.schema.json -d examples/audit-event.example.json --strict=false && npx --yes ajv-cli@5.0.0 validate -s contracts/audit/ProvenanceRecord.schema.json -d examples/provenance-record.example.json --strict=false
scripts.validate: npm run validate:schemas && npm run validate:examples
